## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix (non-breaking)
- [ ] New feature (non-breaking)
- [ ] Breaking change

## How to test

<!-- Steps a reviewer can follow to verify this works. -->

## Checklist

- [ ] `pnpm lint` passes
- [ ] `cargo fmt` and `cargo clippy` pass (if Rust changed)
- [ ] `cargo test` passes (if Rust changed)
- [ ] New Tauri commands are typed on both sides (Rust struct + `src/types.ts`)
- [ ] README / docs updated where relevant
